title: Tech Mahindra is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Tech Mahindra is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Tech Mahindra has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tech Mahindra:
Tech Mahindra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra!
